requirement_topic.en: EMC, Wireless Homologation and Mains-Compatible Chargers — ARCOTEL / INEN
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容、无线型号核准与市电充电器——ARCOTEL / INEN
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容、無線型號核准與市電充電器——ARCOTEL / INEN

summary.en: There is no Ecuadorian CE mark. For power banks and lithium-battery products with a wireless function (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, RFID), the radio module must be homologated with ARCOTEL (Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones), the Ecuadorian telecom regulator, before importation and sale. Any AC mains charger or adapter shipped with the product must be rated for Ecuador's electrical supply of 120 / 220 V at 60 Hz, which differs from China's 220 / 380 V at 50 Hz; the wrong rated frequency or plug type can block customs clearance or fail the Certificate of Conformity. Where a product is in scope of an applicable RTE, electrical-safety and labelling conformity is demonstrated through the INEN Certificate of Conformity rather than a self-declared CE mark.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔没有CE标志。对于具备无线功能（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、RFID）的移动电源及锂电池产品，其无线模块在进口和销售前须向厄瓜多尔电信监管机构ARCOTEL（电信监管与控制局）办理型号核准。随产品出货的任何交流市电充电器或适配器，须按厄瓜多尔120/220 V、60 Hz的供电规格标定，这与中国220/380 V、50 Hz不同；标定频率或插头类型错误可能导致清关受阻或合格证书不通过。若产品落入适用RTE范围，电气安全与标签符合性通过INEN合格证书证明，而非自我声明的CE标志。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾沒有CE標誌。對於具備無線功能（藍牙、Wi-Fi、RFID）的行動電源及鋰電池產品，其無線模組在進口和銷售前須向厄瓜多爾電信監管機構ARCOTEL（電信監管與控制局）辦理型號核准。隨產品出貨的任何交流市電充電器或適配器，須按厄瓜多爾120/220 V、60 Hz的供電規格標定，這與中國220/380 V、50 Hz不同；標定頻率或插頭類型錯誤可能導致清關受阻或合格證書不通過。若產品落入適用RTE範圍，電氣安全與標籤符合性通過INEN合格證書證明，而非自我聲明的CE標誌。

standards_or_laws: ARCOTEL homologation (Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones) for wireless / radio-equipped products
Applicable RTE INEN + INEN Certificate of Conformity for electrical safety and labelling where in scope
Ecuador mains supply 120 / 220 V, 60 Hz — chargers/adapters must be rated accordingly

summary.en: In China, EMC and radio compliance for wireless devices is handled through SRRC type approval for radio transmitters and, where the product is in the CCC catalogue, mandatory CCC certification covering safety and EMC. Chargers and adapters for the domestic market are rated for China's 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase (or 380 V three-phase) supply. SRRC approval and CCC certification are valid only for the Chinese market and are not recognized by ARCOTEL or by the Ecuadorian Certificate of Conformity system.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的电磁兼容与射频合规通过无线电发射设备的SRRC型号核准处理；若产品在CCC目录内，还须取得涵盖安全与电磁兼容的强制性CCC认证。面向国内市场的充电器和适配器按中国220 V/50 Hz单相（或380 V三相）供电标定。SRRC核准与CCC认证仅对中国市场有效，不被ARCOTEL或厄瓜多尔合格证书制度承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備的電磁兼容與射頻合規通過無線電發射設備的SRRC型號核准處理；若產品在CCC目錄內，還須取得涵蓋安全與電磁兼容的強制性CCC認證。面向國內市場的充電器和適配器按中國220 V/50 Hz單相（或380 V三相）供電標定。SRRC核准與CCC認證僅對中國市場有效，不被ARCOTEL或厄瓜多爾合格證書制度承認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (State Radio Regulation of China) for radio transmitters
CCC certification (China Compulsory Certification) where the product is in the CNCA catalogue
China mains supply 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase (380 V three-phase)

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) wireless function requires a separate ARCOTEL homologation in Ecuador that Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy; (2) any bundled charger must be re-rated for 120 / 220 V 60 Hz and an Ecuador-compatible plug, otherwise the unit risks customs rejection or Certificate of Conformity failure; (3) there is no CE-style self-declaration in Ecuador, so EMC and electrical-safety evidence must be channelled into the applicable RTE / INEN Certificate of Conformity file with Spanish documentation; (4) CCC marking carries no recognition in Ecuador.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）无线功能在厄瓜多尔须另行办理ARCOTEL型号核准，中国SRRC核准不能满足；（2）任何随附充电器须按120/220 V、60 Hz及厄瓜多尔兼容插头重新标定，否则该产品可能被海关拒收或合格证书不通过；（3）厄瓜多尔不设CE式自我声明，故电磁兼容与电气安全证据须以西班牙文文件归入适用RTE/INEN合格证书文件；（4）CCC标志在厄瓜多尔不被承认。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）無線功能在厄瓜多爾須另行辦理ARCOTEL型號核准，中國SRRC核准不能滿足；（2）任何隨附充電器須按120/220 V、60 Hz及厄瓜多爾兼容插頭重新標定，否則該產品可能被海關拒收或合格證書不通過；（3）厄瓜多爾不設CE式自我聲明，故電磁兼容與電氣安全證據須以西班牙文文件歸入適用RTE/INEN合格證書文件；（4）CCC標誌在厄瓜多爾不被承認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless products — ARCOTEL homologation is required before import/sale of radio-equipped products; electrical safety/labelling is mandatory through the applicable RTE / INEN Certificate of Conformity where in scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — SRRC approval for radio transmitters and CCC certification where catalogued are required for the Chinese market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador has no CE mark; wireless lithium-battery products require ARCOTEL homologation, and any bundled charger must be rated for 120 / 220 V 60 Hz with an Ecuador-compatible plug. Chinese SRRC and CCC approvals are not recognized. Exporters should route EMC and electrical-safety evidence into the applicable RTE / INEN Certificate of Conformity and verify the wireless homologation step early, since it is a frequent and avoidable cause of customs hold-ups.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔没有CE标志；无线锂电池产品须办理ARCOTEL型号核准，任何随附充电器须按120/220 V、60 Hz及厄瓜多尔兼容插头标定。中国SRRC与CCC核准不被承认。出口商应将电磁兼容与电气安全证据归入适用RTE/INEN合格证书，并尽早核实无线型号核准步骤，因为这是常见且可避免的清关受阻原因。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多爾沒有CE標誌；無線鋰電池產品須辦理ARCOTEL型號核准，任何隨附充電器須按120/220 V、60 Hz及厄瓜多爾兼容插頭標定。中國SRRC與CCC核准不被承認。出口商應將電磁兼容與電氣安全證據歸入適用RTE/INEN合格證書，並盡早核實無線型號核准步驟，因為這是常見且可避免的清關受阻原因。

source.publisher: Agencia de Regulacion y Control de las Telecomunicaciones (ARCOTEL)
